current_commit_message: add rds mssql custom mcp tools
Introduces RdsMCP, an enhanced version of FastMCP, to support new component management capabilities.
refactor(rds_custom toolset): Group toolsets by read/write intent
1. add tool explain_sql, describe_das_metrics; 2. support time transform
supports passing the RDS account information
